title: Shader Panorama of 1.20: Trails & Tales
description: A clean and optimized shader panorama inspired by Minecraft 1.20 Trails & Tales.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21e27c89886fda76adbeee0df3159b4354f04143.png)
This resource pack replaces the Minecraft main menu panorama with a custom
shader-enhanced background inspired by the Trails & Tales update.

Features:
• Vanilla-friendly visuals
• Smooth and calm lighting
• No performance impact
• Works on low-end PCs
• Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+
![Main Title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab6e3e02e32e91961eab4951044d555afe7dc33.jpeg)
This pack only affects the title screen panorama.
No gameplay, textures, or UI elements are changed.
